overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-soaked urban street in a video game environment (resembling GTA V), featuring wet reflective pavement, palm-lined sidewalks, neon-lit modern skyscrapers in the distance, and a transition from commercial areas to traditional low-rise buildings. The scene is illuminated by streetlights and neon signage with a moody blue-green color palette.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet city sidewalk at night, lined with palm trees and illuminated by streetlights. The camera moves forward past a red newspaper vending machine, with modern skyscrapers and neon signage visible in the distance against the dark sky.

segments.scene_description: The camera passes large green dumpsters on the right sidewalk while a flatbed truck is parked on the street. Pedestrians become visible walking ahead in the distance, and traditional low-rise buildings begin to appear on the left side as the modern skyscrapers shift to the right background.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more enclosed traditional commercial area with wooden buildings lining the left side of the sidewalk. The camera follows a pedestrian ahead while passing utility poles and dumpsters, with the modern city skyline now visible only in the distant background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rain-soaked city street that transitions from a modern neon-lit district into a more traditional commercial area. It begins on a wet sidewalk lined with palm trees and streetlights, gliding past a red newspaper vending machine with towering skyscrapers dominating the distant skyline. As the camera advances, the environment shifts as large green dumpsters and a parked flatbed truck appear, while the modern towers recede into the right background to make room for low-rise buildings on the left. The scene then opens into a more enclosed corridor of wooden structures and utility poles, following a pedestrian ahead. Finally, the camera moves deeper into this traditional neighborhood, leaving the glowing city skyline as a faint silhouette in the far distance.
